global.description: Universal baseline for any purpose — git workflow, work patterns, essential guardrails, prompt templates. Works for coding, writing, research, or any task

core.description: Minimal harness baseline — common rules, security, testing, quality hooks

developer.description: Standard developer setup — core + language rules + agent knowledge + workflow skills

full.description: Full install — all steering + hooks + MCP + harness source reference

writer.description: Writing and content creation — articles, social media, research, crossposting

mobile.description: Mobile development — Android, Compose Multiplatform, SwiftUI, Swift concurrency

ai.description: AI/LLM development — Claude API, cost-aware pipelines, on-device models, PyTorch

backend.description: Backend/API development — Django, Spring Boot, Laravel, infrastructure, database

frontend.description: Frontend development — Next.js, Nuxt4, Bun, TypeScript rules

architect.description: Architecture and design — API design, ADRs, blueprint, MCP patterns, quality automation
